member.office_address: 1404 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0515

form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
Please visit this page on Rep. Mullin's website before completing this form. All CPF requests must comply with the requirements found in the subcommittee guidance documents linked on this page: https://appropriations.house.gov/fy27-member-requests/fy27-guidance-overview

Email CA15.Appropriations@mail.house.gov with questions not answered there, or to change your submission.

Please select a 'Request type' first, then provide information in all fields.

sections.description: Details for programmatic funding or report language requests.

fields.label: Request or project name
fields.rationale: Standard programmatic name for the requested NASA account.

fields.label: Department
fields.rationale: The Science Mission Directorate is a major division within NASA.

fields.label: Agency
fields.rationale: The agency responsible for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Specific account and program (include both)
fields.draft_value:
* Account: Science
* Program: Science Mission Directorate
* Request: $9,000,000,000 to support planetary exploration and Earth science
* Local Impact: Supports $1.03M in CA-15 funding to Stanford and SRI International
fields.rationale: Identifies the specific NASA account and highlights the $9B request level and the local economic impact to CA-15 research institutions.

fields.label: Amount
fields.rationale: Consistent with the primary programmatic request for NASA Science.

fields.label: Amount requested in President's FY budget
fields.help_text: Funding level requested in the executive budget proposal.
fields.rationale: Used the pre-filled value provided for this field as per the instructions.
